allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data: name = r[''tag_name''] if name.startswith\(''v3.''\) and ''RC'' not in name and ''M'' not in name: print\(name\) ")
Bash(docker exec postgres-container psql -U root -d gitneo -c "\\dt *user*")
Bash(docker exec postgres-container psql -U root -d gitneo -c "\\d gn_user")
Bash(docker exec postgres-container psql -U root -d postgres -c "ALTER DATABASE gitneo RENAME TO neogit;")
Bash(docker exec postgres-container psql -U root -d neogit -c "\\dt gn_*")
Bash(docker exec postgres-container psql -U root -d neogit -c ":*)
Bash(docker exec postgres-container psql -U root -d neogit -c "\\dt snx_*")
Bash(docker exec postgres-container psql -U root -d neogit -c "SELECT id, name, space_key, space_type FROM snx_space;")
